title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING - 211info
text: TFP THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INC MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling and family counseling. Telehealth options may be available on a case-by-case basis. 390 NE 2nd Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday by appointment Email (541) 889-1050 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-1050 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts most major insurances, Medicaid, and OHP. Sliding scale fees are available for individuals who do not have health insurance. Special funding may be available for Veterans, First Responders, and their family members. DOCUMENTS: Drivers license/state ID card and insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Malheur County (Oregon), Payette and Washington Counties (Idaho) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across the street from Americold Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Individual Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TFP THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INC
